---
name: Backlog item
about: Capture a non-urgent feature, fix, or idea for later
title: ""
labels: "status:backlog"
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or Opportunity

Describe what should be improved and why it matters.

## Desired Outcome

Describe the user-visible or developer-visible result.

## Notes and Context

Add links, screenshots, affected areas, or related issues.

## Initial Labels

Suggested labels:
- `status:backlog`
- `bug`, `enhancement`, `documentation`, `refactor`, or `maintenance`
- Optional `area:*`
